figures.caption: TABLE I: Experimental perturbation parameters. L, M, H, S denote light to severe levels. Top rows: single perturbations. Bottom: composite perturbations.
Fig. 4: Indoor (TUM left, EuRoC right) SLAM trajectory evaluation in the X-Y plane. Legend as in Fig. 3.
TABLE II: SLAM results (ATE RMSE, m). ∆: % change from Clean to S (or H if S fails). ×: tracking failure. Clean is shared per algorithm/dataset.
Fig. 3: Outdoor (KITTI) SLAM trajectory evaluation in the X-Z plane. baseline, Light, Moderate, Heavy, Severe.
